description_long: This is a single bed with a white wooden frame featuring a simple, rectangular headboard and footboard. The bed is dressed with a blue fitted sheet and a loosely draped, white comforter with thin, dark stripes, giving it a casual, lived-in appearance. A matching pillow rests at the head of the bed, partially covered by the comforter. The frame sits low to the ground and has a clean, modern design with straight lines and no visible storage or decorative elements. The bedding appears soft and slightly rumpled, suggesting recent use. The overall look is functional and minimal, suitable for a bedroom in an urban apartment or dormitory.
description: A white wooden single bed with a striped comforter and blue sheet, featuring a simple headboard and footboard. The bedding is slightly rumpled, giving a lived-in, casual appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headboard, pillow, and the striped comforter draped over the blue sheet.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bed, the low frame, and the way the comforter and sheet hang over the edge.
description_view_2: Footboard view displaying the solid white footboard and the bedding extending toward the viewer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the headboard, pillow, and the comforter’s draping from a different angle.
